variants: Manoj Pratihar is a dedicated professional in the field of occupational therapy, where he applies his expertise to enhance the well-being of individuals. His academic journey was shaped under the mentorship of Chantelle Lemoine, who guided him through his development in the field. The Magpie Arc Fund serves as his primary funding source, facilitating his ongoing research and projects.
